brand.name: Memorialize
brand.tagline: Custom keepsakes for people you never want to forget.
brand.heroTitle: Personalized 3D gifts, crafted like a boutique brand.
brand.heroSubtitle: Memorialize turns stories, professions, hobbies, and tiny emotional details into premium custom figurines, display pieces, and gift-ready keepsakes.

owner.name: Sanskar
owner.shortBio: Sanskar started Memorialize as a passion-led studio for turning feelings into physical keepsakes. He enjoys listening to personal stories, finding the one detail that matters, and shaping it into a gift that feels intimate, premium, and deeply personal.
owner.quote: For me, a gift is not an object. It is a small monument to a person, a phase, a friendship, or a feeling.

about.mission: Memorialize exists for people who want gifting to feel personal again. The studio blends AI-assisted concepting, story-first design, and handcrafted finishing to create pieces that look premium and feel emotionally specific.

values.title: Emotion before object
values.desc: Every design begins with the person, memory, relationship, and occasion—not a generic product template.

values.title: Boutique quality
values.desc: Mock approvals, finish choices, engraving, packaging, and quality checkpoints make the experience feel curated.

values.title: Technology with taste
values.desc: AI helps explore directions quickly, while human judgment keeps the final piece tasteful, warm, and brand-worthy.
